title: The Snow Guard (horror)
description: This mod adds a creature that hides in the frozen woods of your world...
body:
# The Snow Guard
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/y6dvYpjBZcs" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
(horror, not a dweller and  please include the mod link if you make videos about it)

The beast is hiding, camouflaged in the snow and concealed among the trees; you know nothing about it. Your mission: kill it. You could use a rifle and follow its tracks, but remember who is the hunter and who is the prey. Remember, the world has already written its story; it is up to you to finish it.

## Events
The entity functions according to the phase it is in (1 to 5); the more days that pass, the higher the phase will be and the more aggressive the entity will behave. The player has an influence on the entity's behavior. n addition, numerous structures allow you to discover the history of the mod.

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

The entity can:

- observe the player
- become invisible
- appear near the player
-spawn jump scares
- approach stealthily
-has a sleep phase

After defeating it, a new version appears; it evolves through phases (6 to 9), becoming more aggressive than before, and can:

- Observe the player
- Become invisible (functions differently than before)
- Appear near the player
- Enter hunting mode
- Fly through the air
- Move very quickly with a different function
- Summon entities

(other events will be added in future updates)

</details>
## Commands

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

To know if an entity has appeared in the world:

/spawnactivity

Number of days since the mod was installed on the world:

/numberofdays

Knowing the stage/phase of the entity:

/phaseentity

Call these 3 commands at the same time:

/globalinformation

Gamerule :

/gamerule theSnowGuardSpawn

(Defines the chance level of seeing the entity : 0 (X1), 1 (X1.5), 2 (X2), 3 (X2.5) and 4 (X3)

</details>

## Items
The mod also adds a rifle for defense against the entity. It must be loaded with bullets.
![Rifle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/44e9707285b16f848a6370d549b7329a4f76fb10.png)![Bullets](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d2722da94451fff3d4f38758e93676bdfe2d8feb.png)
